description: mnemo: inject a memory map at session start; inject cited memory + binding governance rules per prompt; reindex + capture governance evidence on tool use; gate tool calls (PreToolUse) and session end (Stop) against governance rules. All route through the cross-platform `mnemo hook <event>` CLI. Gates default to 'warn' (surface, never block) -- set MNEMO_GOVERNANCE_MODE=block to enforce, MNEMO_GOVERNANCE_BYPASS=1 to override.
